visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a middle-aged male character wearing a grey flat cap, glasses, and a grey Roots hoodie speaking directly to the camera. He is positioned in a studio-like setting with a plain grey background and bright, even lighting. (2) A screen recording of a smartphone appears, showing a LINE account logout notification in Traditional Chinese. (3) The scene cuts back to the man who uses hand gestures, specifically pointing his finger, while yellow and black text overlays appear at the top and bottom. (4) A mock-up of a LINE chat interface is shown, with a circular inset of the man's face appearing over the screen as he continues his explanation. (5) The man returns to the main frame, gesturing with both hands to emphasize his points. Additional variety-style text with green and yellow backgrounds appears to highlight the new feature. (6) A screen capture of an 'About' menu shows version number '15.4.0' being circled in yellow. (7) The final phase shows the man gesturing towards a '再次登入' (Login again) button overlay as he concludes the presentation.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥 [Logo]: @ 3ctim [Logo]: miko. [Subtitle]: 你是不是也有過. (2) [Variety]: 導致聊天紀錄流失. (3) [Subtitle]: 甚至你的line帳號呢, 去詐騙你的親朋好友. [Slogan]: #安捏母湯. (4) [Slogan]: #你是無辜的!. [Variety]: 為了了解決這問題!!. (5) [Slogan]: 再次登入功能. [Variety]: 快速登入原帳號. [Variety]: 聊天紀錄保留. (6) [Variety]: 15.4.0. [Slogan]: #含以上!. (7) [Variety]: 嘗試重新登入.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man wearing a grey flat cap, clear-framed glasses, a grey Roots hoodie, and a wooden bead bracelet on his right wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is a solid, neutral grey studio backdrop. Secondary backgrounds include various digital screen captures of the LINE mobile application interface and version information screens.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A clear, energetic male voice begins speaking in Mandarin, introducing a relatable problem with LINE accounts. A bright, medium-tempo electronic BGM with a steady kick drum beat provides a continuous bed. (2) A subtle 'pop' sound effect triggers as a text overlay appears on screen. The vocal delivery is sharp and authoritative. (3) A 'click' or 'ding' digital UI sound effect emphasizes the transition to a screen capture. The music maintains its energy without interruption. (4) The narrator increases speech speed slightly when describing technical steps. The interplay between the crisp vocal and the synth-heavy BGM creates a high-energy information-dense texture. (5) Final phase features a concluding 'ding' sound effect as the narrator calls for a retry, with the music fading slightly in the final second.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Problem -> Solution -> Requirement -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To educate LINE users on a new feature that prevents the loss of chat history and prevents account hijacking when a user is unexpectedly logged out, specifically highlighting the 'Re-login' function and the necessary software version.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Consistent presence of 'miko' branding logo and social media handles for '3c有意思tim哥', suggesting a sponsored tech tip or channel promotion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality vertical video optimized for social media platforms like TikTok/Reels, utilizing dense text overlays and rapid editing to maintain high viewer engagement.
